reviews.name: places/ChIJH4xP_AfruIkRUtESkz22wC0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWb1JERXphMlUyTUhwdlFUUmplRXBxWVhCNFJXYxAB
reviews.text: Experienced right knee pain playing and refereeing high school and travel soccer. Was informed and verified that I had two radial tears in my minicus requiring surgery. Cost at this time was prohibitive (8 to 13 thousand dollars) with Medicare only.  Another referee friend mentioned Dr. Childers and Ozone Therapy. After four treatments over a period of four months I was back refereeing and playing with no aftereffects, no medications, no rehab, no pain. That was almost exactly 5 years ago to the month and I am playing 8 softball  games per week and participating in travel softball up and down the east coast of the US. I have just accompanied one of my softball buddies in hopes that he can receive the same treatment.    Rich McLaughlin

reviews.name: places/ChIJH4xP_AfruIkRUtESkz22wC0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKMGNsOHdaRlZKY0dOa2IzcFBXbFZDU2t4c2QwRRAB
reviews.text: When I first came to see Dr. Childers, I was dealing with severe neuropathy from the waist down. The Neuropathy was ongoing for the past year and a half. I’ve been treated with multiple nerve blocks that only provided very temporary, but not full relief. I received PRP therapy from Dr Childers and after a week, the pain was completely gone. I am so ecstatic over the results. Dr Childers knows what he is doing.

reviews.name: places/ChIJH4xP_AfruIkRUtESkz22wC0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNk9faFlnEAE
reviews.text:
They were so warm and welcoming, I felt comfortable right away. Dr Childers is so knowledgeable and wanted me to be well informed about the decisions I was making.
He gave me so much time, I never felt rushed, and I couldn’t not be more thrilled as I left his office.
Run, don’t walk to his office!

reviews.name: places/ChIJH4xP_AfruIkRUtESkz22wC0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnMU92RXJRRRAB
reviews.text:
For the last two years I’ve had unbearable sciatica pain from a collapsed back disc. After numerous back injections and consulting with orthopedic surgeons I was told to live with the pain. Luckily I found Dr. Childers. After extensive blood work I was treated for my condition.  Within two weeks 90% of my pain was gone. Dr. Childers staff was the best they intricately work with Dr. Childers to make sure I received the right treatment.
Very happy and pain free.
Don

reviews.name: places/ChIJH4xP_AfruIkRUtESkz22wC0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmbnJLRzJBRRAB
reviews.text: I’m recovering from two different cancer diagnoses. When I first came to Delaware Integrative Medicine, I was miserable. Following surgery, I couldn’t sleep, I was deeply depressed, and on top of everything else, my skin everywhere was so dry that it burned. My labs showed my red and white blood cell counts were abnormal, as were my liver values. I started on twice weekly IV vitamin C, blood ozonation, and liver support. I also started taking a number of daily supplements. It took about three months but today I feel terrific. I have plenty of energy, I exercise daily, my mood is good, and best of all, I can sleep! I’m so grateful to Dr. Childers and everyone at Delaware Integrative Medicine!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9cPU_V65uIkRMDPVnlcuZmk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4NFdWWXRia2h6VTNsdVNteEtWWGxzYzNWdVVrRRAB
reviews.text: Ashley is the best in the business! I have been getting my Botox done by her for almost a year now and she’s truly the best injector that’s ever worked on my face. Her professional, knowledgeable and skill are unmatched. The space itself is comfortable and welcoming. I will be recommending Ashley at ProMD to all of my family and friends!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9cPU_V65uIkRMDPVnlcuZmk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xrNVMwOHlYelUwVFZkelFWWnFWM0oyT1VGWWNGRRAB
reviews.text:
I had a consult with Ashley and Taryn and they made recommendations for my face treatments. Ashley spent a lot of time explaining the different types  of injections and the benefits of each. Both ladies are extremely knowledgeable. After the first of the year i will go back with a plan for treatments. I’m excited and comfortable that this group knows what they are doing.
I previously had a hydrafacial with Taryn and it made a big difference in my skin, which is why i chose to return to the practice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9cPU_V65uIkRMDPVnlcuZmk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGdVdYSm5jV1J5TlZCa04zYzNZa2hKWjJnNFZGRRAB
reviews.text:
I went in not really knowing what I wanted to do, but I knew I wanted to start taking steps toward improving my overall appearance. As I’m getting older, there were a few lines I wanted to smooth out, and I decided to try something new. By the time I left, I truly felt at home!

Ashley was incredibly knowledgeable and made me feel comfortable the entire time. Emily at the front desk was so sweet and welcoming. There was a bit of a wait, but they were very apologetic  and honestly, it gave me a few minutes to relax and sneak in a little nap. The whole team was professional, friendly, and informative. I can’t wait to go back again!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9cPU_V65uIkRMDPVnlcuZmk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pRNWRGbHBOazV4V0hOa1kyNDNhbFJxWm1Wc2RGRRAB
reviews.text: I have had the best experience at pro-md. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was welcoming, clean, and relaxing. Smells fantastic also! The staff was professional, knowledgeable, and Ashley took the time to explain every step, making me feel completely comfortable. My treatment results exceeded my expectations—I left feeling refreshed, confident, and cared for. Highly recommend to anyone looking for the most amazing experience. I am truly happy with my results a d they keep getting better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9cPU_V65uIkRMDPVnlcuZmk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4SVEwbHVWR1JEVFRVMGRWcExiV2xVY2tWc2NFRRAB
reviews.text:
Pro MD in Lewes is the best!! All the ladies in there are always so kind and so welcoming. I had the pleasure of getting a Hydro facial done today by Taryn, and it was absolutely amazing! She put me to sleep in the best way! She was very informative and answered all my questions. Extremely professional and the best facial I have ever had!
I also saw Ashley for some filler and she did such an amazing job!! I almost cried when I saw my lips because I was so incredibly happy! Ashley is so fun and bubbly and so professional and very, very informative on everything that she was doing. I was a little nervous so she kept me calm through the whole process. I love going to pro MD.in Lewes And pampering myself anytime I need to do some self-care! I would highly recommend this place to anyone!!🤍

reviews.text:
I had such a great experience at Seaside Wellness! I came in for an IV treatment and Botox, and the whole visit was amazing from start to finish. The staff was incredibly kind, welcoming, and professional. They made me feel comfortable right away and took the time to answer all my questions. The treatments were done really well, and you can tell they truly care about their clients and the quality of their work. Everything was clean, relaxing, and well organized. I left feeling refreshed and really happy with my results.
Highly recommend Seaside Wellness if you’re looking for a place that’s friendly, knowledgeable, and does great work!

reviews.name: places/ChIJk5C-flg6NUQRJD2vXurpJVw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkTFFVdFpRVXR2VFhGMVdGOXBYemQyVW5wS2NWRRAB
reviews.text: I had a great experience with the IV immunity drip at Seaside Wellness in Lewes.  The environment was calming & comfortable, the staff was knowledgeable and friendly as well.  I felt energized and refreshed afterward.  They have many drips to choose from to meet your needs.  I highly recommend for anyone looking to boost their wellness👍

reviews.name: places/ChIJk5C-flg6NUQRJD2vXurpJVw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsaExXY3dkeTFKVjJoUFMydFpXVlUzZDJGWFkzYxAB
reviews.text: Seaside wellness was such an enjoyable experience. Dr. Mohammed, Devon the practice manager, and Kat the PA were professional, knowledgeable, and beyond kind. It was my first time getting Botox and they made me feel safe, secure, and prepared. I couldn’t be happier with my treatment!

reviews.name: places/ChIJk5C-flg6NUQRJD2vXurpJVw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoeGRrSnJkVGs0T1ZoS1RGVTJlVWRpY3kxbmNGRRAB
reviews.text: From the second you walk in, you feel welcomed!! Devon is so personable. The office is SUPER cute and inviting. Dr. Mohammed and his PA, Kat are professional and knowledgeable. Def would highly recommend scheduling an appointment.

reviews.name: places/ChIJk5C-flg6NUQRJD2vXurpJVw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5T1pqSk5aREF3VUhSNFZVSXRja1poY0U1NmFsRRAB
reviews.text: The professionalism and attention to detail is outstanding! They make every treatment specific to you and you are the star of the show. The facility if super clean and very calming when you need to just unwind and relax. I wish I could give them more stars because they are a whole other level above any competitors.

reviews.name: places/ChIJyQtugb2hx4kRpBA3Ab_ARPs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSTlMwNDBSMnhyWWtWQ1dIQldkWEF6Y1haRGFXYxAB
reviews.text:
Doug is the absolute best.

I had a great experience working with him. He’s professional, knowledgeable, and truly takes the time to listen instead of rushing you through an appointment. This isn’t a large chain clinic like others I’ve had poor experiences with in the past — Doug provides genuinely personalized care and is incredibly thorough in tailoring treatment to your specific needs.

Everything was explained clearly, from lab work to treatment options, and I felt comfortable and confident in the plan we put together. The environment is clean, discreet, and welcoming, which makes a big difference for this type of care.

I highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for thorough, personalized men’s health treatment or considering testosterone therapy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJyQtugb2hx4kRpBA3Ab_ARPs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25JMlRWRmFUalk1Y1dOVU5sTldZMTg0VkZkVFNHYxAB
reviews.text:
Doug is the BOMB. If you're a guy who's been feeling run down, low energy, or just not like yourself, THIS is the place to go. Doug is an expert. He actually takes the time to look at the full picture of your health instead of just handing out a prescription.

From the first consultation, everything felt professional and straightforward. He walks you through the labs, explains your numbers, and builds a plan tailored specifically to you. He focuses on REAL medical care and ongoing monitoring—not just a quick fix.

The difference in ENERGY, FOCUS, and overall PERFORMANCE has been HUGE. If you’re even thinking about getting your hormones checked or optimizing your health, I can’t recommend Everstrong enough.

Doug has built something special here. Five stars all the way.

reviews.name: places/ChIJyQtugb2hx4kRpBA3Ab_ARPs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoUlQycEZOQzF1Wm1OU2FubFhjREZvVjB4dGFHYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about Everstrong Men’s Health and Doug in particular. From the first appointment, Doug was professional, knowledgeable, and extremely easy to talk to. He took the time to thoroughly review my labs, explain everything in detail, and answer all of my questions without ever making me feel rushed.

What really stands out is how personalized the care feels. Doug clearly cares about his patients and tailors treatment to your specific goals and needs rather than taking a one-size-fits-all approach. The entire process has been smooth, organized, and professional.

If you’re considering TRT or any men’s health services, I highly recommend scheduling a consultation with Doug. Top-notch care and a great overall experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJyQtugb2hx4kRpBA3Ab_ARPs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkQ1NtUkNhRjkyVDNoWlQyaE9OMmx6YTB0Vk1XYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t recommend Doug enough. An incredibly knowledgeable and compassionate provider who truly takes the time to listen and understand your goals. You never feel rushed, and everything is explained clearly so you can make informed decisions about your health.

Since opening his own men’s health clinic, he’s created a space that’s professional, efficient, and focused on real results. The level of care and attention to detail really sets him apart.

If you’re looking for someone who genuinely cares and delivers top-tier care, this is the place to go.

reviews.name: places/ChIJyQtugb2hx4kRpBA3Ab_ARPs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Kb1IzSTNlV0p4VldaQmJtWjFYMk5HVkRaSGFFRRAB
reviews.text: Doug provides outstanding patient care. He is extremely knowledgeable and takes his time with each visit, making sure all concerns are addressed clearly and respectfully. He explains things in a way that’s easy to understand and makes you feel comfortable and confident in your care. Most importantly, he genuinely cares about his patients. I would highly recommend Doug to anyone looking for compassionate, high-quality care.

name: Functional Medicine of Delaware
classificationReason: Functional medicine clinic typically offers hormone therapy

reviews.name: places/ChIJz08ZcWKhx4kR_A9CVEnB7d4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxaWRteG5ja2xZUm5OelFsaDZjamhtVTE5aFExRRAB
reviews.text:
My name is Dr. Mahmoud Embaby. I have been working with Functional Medicine Of Delaware for more than 4 years now. As a physician I can attest to their incredible attention to detail and how deeply Dr. Ashley Allen pay attention not only to alleviate symptoms but to also completely fix the root cause of whatever the underlying issue is. She has helped me fix my gut issues which have in turn cured a plethora of symptoms I was suffering from.

However my life has completely transformed after working with Randy Smith. He has by far completely transformed my strength, endurance, and power after working with him. His knowledge is absolutely incredible, and his understanding of Anatomy, Muscular Physiology, Myo-kinetics, Bio-Physics, Neuro-muscular innervation, and Physical Therapy, goes far beyond anyone I have ever seen or worked with in my life. He thoroughly listens and understands the issue completely and highlights the underlying problem and how to address it and within just a couple of sessions you will begin to feel and see improvement.

The Neufit System that Randy Smith uses is ABSOLUTELY INCREDIBLE!!! It allows a direct pinpoint of the muscles and areas of stress and tension and with Randy's amazing knowledge of the muscles and the machine he can utilize the Neufit technology to engage the muscles in EXACTLY the right way in order to reset it to it's required Baseline, and begin to address the targeted program to achieve results exceeding the required expectations in half the time it would take with normal PT, or alternative therapies. I have worked with Randy and the Neufit technology for 2 months now and I have seen improvements on every aspect we have addressed ( Physical Strength, Muscle Endurance, Recovery, Training, and more )

I am really excited and looking forward to continue working with Randy at Functional Medicine Of Delaware, and believe he is the ABSOLUTE BEST in the field for all Muscle-Skeletal and Physical Therapy Activities.

I Give Randy Smith And Functional Medicine Of Delaware 100 Stars If I Could And Cannot Recommend Them Enough To Anyone.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz08ZcWKhx4kR_A9CVEnB7d4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGWlJWTlNaMVprTkdkaVNVeEtlbmxMWkZOUGRIYxAB
reviews.text: I am so grateful for this company. I have just started but feel so seen by Stephanie. Her desire to help me and change my circumstances is so sweet. In a world where the medical field sees you as a number it is nice to have a Dr see you as a human. She thoroughly listens to your concerns and current problems and does not brush it off as anxiety or simply hormones but actually wants to get to the root of the problem. So thankful!

reviews.name: places/ChIJz08ZcWKhx4kR_A9CVEnB7d4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25jeFdXdHRSbWxXVTNsTlkzaHFRM05qVDBkSlVWRRAB
reviews.text:
I had my first appointment with Stephanie and I couldn’t be more impressed. From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was warm, welcoming, and calming. The staff was friendly and professional, and I immediately felt at ease.
What stood out the most was how thorough and attentive Stephanie was. She took the time to really listen to my concerns, ask detailed questions about my health history, and explain the functional approach in a way that made sense. I never felt rushed, and I appreciated how the focus was on getting to the root cause of issues.
I left feeling hopeful and empowered with a personalized plan that feels realistic and tailored to my needs. I am looking forward to my follow-ups!
Highly recommend to anyone looking for a deeper, more holistic approach to their health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz08ZcWKhx4kR_A9CVEnB7d4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pjNWQyMUhXVzFRUkhabk0yOUZkRUozWkZoclZYYxAB
reviews.text: I was so impressed with Ashley Allen at my first consult visit. She spent more time with me talking about my medical history, family, history, and goals than anyone else I have ever encountered in the medical profession. She is extremely knowledgeable and sincerely interested in helping her patients find the best options for them with an inclusive perspective.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz08ZcWKhx4kR_A9CVEnB7d4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSQ1FXTlBWbU13YUdSb2FHTlpORzlaTUVjMWNWRRAB
reviews.text: I recently had my first appointment with Stephanie and it went wonderfully. The office was clean, comfortable, and welcoming. Stephanie was friendly, easy to talk to, and incredibly thorough in her approach. I left feeling heard and optimistic, and I’m excited to continue working with her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ8Y7KP0Ax4kRc10vWFr857k/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwX3RHVmJnEAE
reviews.text: This office is amazing! Everyone that you encounter from when you check in until you check out is so welcoming and friendly. I have been receiving hormone pellets for a few years, and it has changed my life! Dina is so thoughtful, thorough, and caring. She is truly amazing and so knowledgeable. I highly recommend this office!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ8Y7KP0Ax4kRc10vWFr857k/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbjlqUG9RRRAB
reviews.text: Having gone through the initial analysis, and being a valid candidate I found the therapy to be the best thing I've ever done in my life. The staff is efficient and caring and they make you feel comfortable and cared for. It's been 10 years and I would never change a thing.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ8Y7KP0Ax4kRc10vWFr857k/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzak1HbXB3RRAB
reviews.text: Yes the pellets therapy has helped me tremendously, I feel my age again and the hot flashes are gone but just as important is the Caring, Supportive and Professional Staff - Melissa, Kim & Katie care about me like Family - They are truly Amazing!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ8Y7KP0Ax4kRc10vWFr857k/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReE5uOWpBRRAB
reviews.text: So happy I started going here . Has been about 2 years now . Has changed my life for the better . Love all of the staff , make you feel like family. My Hormones made me feel like I was going crazy . Feel happy again and normal. Yay!!!!!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ8Y7KP0Ax4kRc10vWFr857k/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrbThTY0J3EAE
reviews.text: While this website states Bio Equivalent Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT) “reduces the risk of breast cancer”, according to my team of cancer specialists there is no proof of this and, in fact, my personal experience has been just the opposite. While there are benefits to BHRT, before undergoing treatment, I urge you to consult with a cancer specialist, not a gynecologist, particularly not one associated with Bioidental Options.

reviews.name: places/ChIJW8ggQV4Bx4kR46-E9LzBmps/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OQ04zcEpiV3hDTlhBMWFFTjBhR0ZyY1VjMGJVRRAB
reviews.text: Great staff! Kim the Clinical Director is freaking awesome! Knowledgeable and has helped me on my health and wellness journey to be my best self possible.

reviews.name: places/ChIJW8ggQV4Bx4kR46-E9LzBmps/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wSWFVNVJibXhhVVcxTFlYSjBZekp3WmkxU1pGRRAB
reviews.text: I absolutely hate shots but when I came to game day, Lindsay and Venus gave me an injection and both of them did a phenomenal job. I didn’t feel a thing I would recommend either one of them if you were scared of getting shots. It was a great environment and I will be coming back.

reviews.name: places/ChIJW8ggQV4Bx4kR46-E9LzBmps/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210SmVrcHpUVGRHYWpaUVRXcFFSVlZxYjJ4TlpHYxAB
reviews.text: GameDay Men's Health Christiana was an awesome experience from start to finish. The team was professional, respectful and made everything easy to understand. I never felt rushed, and they genuinely cared about helping me feel my best. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJW8ggQV4Bx4kR46-E9LzBmps/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twSFJXeFJOSFJYZGxBeGNGaExibkJHVEdKQ2NWRRAB
reviews.text: From the moment I walked I was greeted a with a hello. The reception area has all the forms ready to go without having you to wait. The waiting room had everything you expect in a Men’s Health Clinic - Sports Magazines, NFL on the TV and Snacks with a good variety too. The space felt comfortable with comfy chairs even had charging stations for any phone. Intake was super easy and the consult with the Director was very educational.

reviews.name: places/ChIJW8ggQV4Bx4kR46-E9LzBmps/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSVWFXSTRabHBHYmtaTVZIbFpiMXBuVXpsM1VIYxAB
reviews.text: I had a great experience at Game Day Men’s Health. From the blood work to helping me find the right treatment plan, everything was smooth and professional. The team really knows their stuff and made sure I got exactly what I needed to feel better. They do everything the right way — honestly, the only thing they didn’t fix was my golf swing (but I guess that’s not included in the treatment 😅). Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJa8hvS18Bx4kRr80dl-xUHao/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tobmVtb3pUVVpVTjJabFR6ZG9TamRNVURaWFVHYxAB
reviews.text:
I love Andrea! I have been seeing Andrea for quite some time, I have been struggling with Hashimoto thyrodisim and some mineral deficiency. Andrea, took time on the very first visit to  thoroughly learned about my health history and gain better understanding of my condition. Her approach to treatment is very different from main stream medicine. She cares about your diet, environment you in, daily habits and sensitive to what your able to adjust- in order to improve your overall health. Since seeing Andrea, my health is much better. I learned to better take care of my self and make healthier choices. I have nothing but gratitude and highly recommend Andrea.
I had my husband and teenage daughter see Andrea to assess their overall health.

I appreciate the call follow ups, check- ins, thorough blood work and overall treatment.

reviews.name: places/ChIJa8hvS18Bx4kRr80dl-xUHao/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KU1JWb3hVWFEwVG5OdVpFaFBZMU5YTUZKMmVHYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been seeing Andrea for awhile now and she is fantastic. She’s compassionate, and truly cares about getting to the root cause of whatever issue you are coming to see her for. She does a great job of researching symptoms/issues and coming up with solutions based on her expertise, research, and the network of other professionals she works with to solve people’s complex issues. Not only that, but she does a fantastic job managing the human side of these issues and you can tell she genuinely cares about her patients. I was skeptical of the holistic medicine approach when we started, and was forthcoming with Andrea about my concerns. I can happily say she was understanding of them and has proved those concerns I had to be wrong. I can’t recommend her or her practice enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJa8hvS18Bx4kRr80dl-xUHao/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kdmRtWnVWMGxrYVhGcWJFbzJlVXRzTlVOaGRuYxAB
reviews.text:
Renew Integrative Health has truly been life-changing for me. Andrea has been nothing short of amazing in helping me manage my fibromyalgia, hypothyroidism, and a very low immune system.

Before working with her, I was in a fibromyalgia flare more than half the year. After three years under her care, flares are less than 10% of the time — something traditional doctors could not accomplish in over 17 years.

For a few years I also used to be constantly sick — colds, bronchitis, you name it. That cycle is finally broken.

Everyone’s journey is different, but if you stick with Andrea and follow her treatment plan, healing is possible. I’m beyond grateful for her knowledge, care, and commitment to getting to the root cause — not just masking symptoms.

Highly recommend 💜

reviews.name: places/ChIJa8hvS18Bx4kRr80dl-xUHao/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOUlZFNUlXVzh6UlUxTWVEYzFaVTFLVkRJeVVXYxAB
reviews.text: We are thankful to have found Andrea and Renew Integrative Health.  After a year+ of visits with specialty doctors, multiple medicines and treatments, Andrea was the only provider able to actually pinpoint what was happening with our daughter. She took her time to thoroughly assess our daughter and all of her symptoms, she walked us through each step of treatment with kindness and care and she is feeling better than she has in years!

reviews.name: places/ChIJa8hvS18Bx4kRr80dl-xUHao/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3eDlpOVJ3EAE
reviews.text: Andrea has been an amazing help to me. When no one could or would help me, she persisted and helped get me to the point where I can do things again. She is very genuine and always well meaning. Her office manager Teren is amazing as well , very pleasant. They are a great team! I would recommend Andrea and her office to anybody struggling with an illness.
